tools.name: list_crossings
tools.description: Search UK level crossings by name, URL word or region. Returns matches with their status URLs.

tools.name: crossing_status
tools.description: Live barrier status, next-30-minute closure timeline and approaching trains for one crossing (markdown). Pass the crossing's URL word (from list_crossings) or its name.

tools.name: crossings_near
tools.description: Nearest listed level crossings to a lat/lon.

tools.name: busiest_today
tools.description: Today's ranking of crossings by predicted road-closed time.
